title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Container Corporation of India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Container Corporation of India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Logistics Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!
